lighting.shadow_character: 거의 느껴지지 않을 정도로 옅고 부드러움

texture.detail_rendering: 액자 표면의 매트한 질감이 잘 살아있음

improvement_notes: 드라마틱한 느낌을 위해 더 단단한 광원과 낮은 각도 사용, 감성적인 라이프스타일 사진을 위해 따뜻한 톤의 컬러 그레이딩 적용, 45도 앵글과 소품을 활용하여 이야기 부여
nano_banana_prompt: A vibrant and colorful poke bowl, top-down flat lay photography, graphic composition. Shot in a bright studio with a large overhead softbox, creating extremely soft and minimal shadows. Bold, high-saturation colors focusing on the fresh red of tuna, green of avocado, and yellow of mango. Modern and clean aesthetic, minimalist white background. Shot with an 85mm lens for a distortion-free view, deep depth of field (f/11), tack sharp focus across the entire image. Commercial food photography style, clean and crisp, inspired by high-end catalog imagery.
